title: pixel & purple pvp pack
description: The main changes in the texture pack affected both swords, the Totem of Immortality, and the Golden and Enchanted Apples. The armor was also updated, but potions also changed.
body: The diamond armor texture has changed and is now pixelated pink, the netherite armor texture has changed and is now light black, the diamond and netherite sword textures have changed, golden apples have become dark purple, enchanted apples have also become purple but with a purple glow, the Ender Crystal texture has changed, the Totem of Immortality texture has changed, the potion texture has changed, and pearls have become pixelated purple (can be seen in the gallery)
